TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Giorgi Margvelashvili ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 9, Giorgi Margvelashvili, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Georgia ta' misuw hya' ga Giorgi Margvelashvili, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: …£ior…£i mar…£*elas~…ēńß*ili rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, …£ior…£i mar…£*elas~…ēńß*ili, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£eor…£ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a …£ior…£i mar…£*elas~…ēńß*ili, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Giorgi Margvelashvili ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 9, Giorgi Margvelashvili, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Georgia ta' misuw hya' ga Giorgi Margvelashvili, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£eor…£ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a …£ior…£i mar…£*elas~…ēńß*ili, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
